overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval military encampment built within ruined brick fortifications, then descending wooden stairs to a waterfront area and crossing a long wooden bridge. The scene transitions from a crowded courtyard to a scenic riverside path with lush vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: military encampment in ruined brick fortress courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the military camp courtyard, passing between checkered tents and ruined brick walls

notable_agents.action: soldier sitting on wooden bench near campfire
armored guard standing near checkered tent

entered.detail: tall red brick walls with arched windows, partially collapsed
black and yellow checkered canvas tents with wooden frames
burning fire pit with soldiers gathered around
large wooden portcullis gate at the far end of the courtyard

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a bustling military encampment set within the ruins of a brick fortress. Checkered tents line the cobblestone courtyard while soldiers sit by campfires or stand guard. The camera follows from behind as he approaches a large wooden gate at the far end of the enclosure.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden gate passage leading to scenic overlook

events.description: passes through the wooden gate from the enclosed courtyard to the open overlook
emerging from shadow of gate into brighter sunlight with expansive sky view

agents.ego_description: passing through the wooden gate structure into the open air overlooking the river valley

notable_agents.action: guard standing by the gate watching the river

entered.detail: open view of river valley with distant forested mountains
rough wooden safety railing along the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: Geralt exits the fortress through a heavy wooden gate, transitioning from the enclosed courtyard to a scenic overlook. The view opens to reveal a wide river valley below with distant mountains. The ruined brick walls now flank only the left side as he approaches the edge of the cliff.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden staircase descending to waterfront

events.description: begins descending the wooden stairs toward the river
reaches the bottom of stairs and steps onto the wooden dock by the water

agents.ego_description: walking down the steep wooden stairs toward the river, following an NPC guard

notable_agents.action: armored guard walking down the stairs ahead of Geralt

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase with support beams and partial roof covering
calm blue river visible through the wooden structure
planked wooden walkway extending along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: Geralt descends a covered wooden staircase built into the cliffside, following a guard down to the waterfront. The structure has wooden support beams and a partial roof, with glimpses of the river visible through the sides. He emerges onto a wooden dock at the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside path with temporary wooden structures

events.description: passing a campfire with resting soldiers near a small shack

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path by the water's edge, passing soldiers and small wooden shacks

notable_agents.action: soldier sitting by campfire sharpening equipment

entered.detail: worn dirt trail running alongside the riverbank
crude temporary shelters with canvas roofs and wooden barrels
white-barked trees with green foliage lining the path

segments.scene_description: Walking along a dirt path beside the river, Geralt passes small wooden shacks and birch trees. Soldiers rest by campfires near the water's edge. The terrain is more natural here with grass and trees replacing the stone ruins, and the path leads toward a wooden bridge in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge extending over river water

events.description: steps onto the wooden bridge crossing over the river

agents.ego_description: crossing the long wooden bridge with railings on both sides, water visible below

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead on the bridge

entered.detail: long wooden bridge with railings extending over the river

segments.scene_description: Geralt steps onto a wooden bridge that extends over the river, with water now visible on both sides through the railings. The bridge leads across the water toward the distant forested shore, with birch trees lining the approach. The camera follows him as he crosses the span.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a crowded military fortress into a serene, open riverside landscape. It begins by following Geralt through a bustling cobblestone courtyard filled with checkered tents and campfires before he passes through a heavy wooden gate. As he exits the enclosure, the scene opens into a wide river valley with distant mountains, leading him down a covered wooden staircase built into the cliffside. The environment then shifts from stone ruins to a natural dirt path lined with birch trees and small shacks at the water's edge. Finally, the camera follows him as he leaves the shoreline behind to cross a long wooden bridge extending over the river toward a forested shore.
